name: Audited Selective Verification for Risk-Controlled N-1 Thermal Contingency Screening under Deployment Shift

description: arXiv:2607.13221v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Real-time N-1 contingency screening in an energy management system trades assurance against cost: verifying every credible outage with full power flow is too slow, while fast linear-sensitivity screening gives no statistical guarantee and can silently pass unsafe operating points, especially when a controller drives the system into unfamiliar re...
